userMessage: I'm testing a TI MSPM0 microcontroller running at 32MHz. Set up a complete protocol validation flow: configure UART on B1 CH1 115200 8N1 and trigger on a start bit, then on B2 configure I2C CH2 clock CH3 data at 400kHz fast mode and trigger on address 0x50 read, then on B3 configure SPI CH4 clock MOSI CH1 MISO CH2 CS CH3 active low and trigger on SS. Run single sequence for each bus, save a screenshot per test, add frequency measurement on CH1 to verify the 32MHz clock, query the result, then error check and disconnect.

response.text:
I can’t generate an applyable TekAutomate flow for your full UART/I2C/SPI trigger + measurement sequence yet because the required exact, source-verified SCPI headers for UART 8N1+start-bit trigger, I2C address/fast-mode/clock+trigger on 0x50, SPI CS active-low+trigger on SS, and the frequency measurement source/result query aren’t all verified in the conversation state.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Insufficient verified SCPI coverage to build the complete protocol validation flow requested.","findings":["Verified in conversation state: BUS:B<x>:TYPe (bus type) plus trigger-related placeholders for TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:DIRection and TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:POLarity, and MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY (but not the full measurement source assignment and frequency result query header).","Not verified in conversation state: UART configuration commands for B1/CH1 (115200, 8N1) and the specific trigger condition/header for ‘start bit’, I2C configuration commands for B2 including address 0x50 trigger and 400kHz fast-mode plus trigger condition headers, SPI configuration commands for B3 including MOSI/MISO/CS mapping, CS active-low header, trigger condition header for SS, and any exact acquisition run/sequence-completion sync that avoids non-verified constructs."],"suggestedFixes":["Please retrieve (via MCP) the exact SCPI headers/commands for: (1) UART/RS232C setup (baud + 8N1) on bus B1 and trigger-on-start-bit, (2) I2C fast-mode 400 kHz clock/data source + address=0x50 trigger, (3) SPI clock/MOSI/MISO/CS mapping + CS polarity active-low + trigger-on-SS, (4) measurement source for the added FREQUENCY measurement on CH1 and the exact query header that returns that FREQUENCY result (with a known saveAs target)."],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: Insufficient verified SCPI coverage to build the complete protocol validation flow requested.

Not verified in conversation state: UART configuration commands for B1/CH1 (115200, 8N1) and the specific trigger condition/header for ‘start bit’, I2C configuration commands for B2 including address 0x50 trigger and 400kHz fast-mode plus trigger condition headers, SPI configuration commands for B3 including MOSI/MISO/CS mapping, CS active-low header, trigger condition header for SS, and any exact acquisition run/sequence-completion sync that avoids non-verified constructs.
suggestedFixes: Please retrieve (via MCP) the exact SCPI headers/commands for: (1) UART/RS232C setup (baud + 8N1) on bus B1 and trigger-on-start-bit, (2) I2C fast-mode 400 kHz clock/data source + address=0x50 trigger, (3) SPI clock/MOSI/MISO/CS mapping + CS polarity active-low + trigger-on-SS, (4) measurement source for the added FREQUENCY measurement on CH1 and the exact query header that returns that FREQUENCY result (with a known saveAs target).
